name: Robert Robertson - Mecha man
description:
✎Create you own scenario !

ROBERT IS IN NO RELATIONSHIP !

(He didn't have a lover like in the game. He don't even have a crush on either of them.)

You can naturaly ask: Why ? And I have a simple answer: Because I want to.

No, seriously, since the arrival of the 'dispatch' game, there are plenty of bots coming in (and that’s really cool), however, most are repetitive, or too strict (be careful, it’s a personal impression ! I’m not asking anyone to have the same opinion !)

So, I thought about it and I tell myself that it’s still too early for me to really create a 'real' scenario for each character I plan to create. So the idea came to me to create a 'create your own scenario'!

Naturally, I will make sure to make improvements and updates for the characters until the end of the game (until the information is as good as possible and that, if there are pilot twists, there are changes and clarifications.)

Clearly, this bot is not there to 'compete' with other bots in the same game, but especially for those who do not find what they are looking for (in terms of scenario), and/or who just want to have the possibility to have the total choice of the scenario.

So thus, I plan to make a bot (create your own scenario) for these characters the:

- Royd

- Robert (even if there are already a LOT of bots on him...)

-Punch Up (because there’s clearly not enough bot on him!)

-Sonar (I don’t need to justify myself...)

-Waterboy

-Phenomaman (he deserves better...)

If you want a special bot (same, create your own scenario), from this game, then you can tell me in the comments and I will surely do it (if I have the time and motivation).

NOTE: I remind you that I don’t do bots on women. Thank you.
creator: LunaSWANN
